---
description: Review or update the architecture migration template, then create a scope-specific architecture migration plan
agent: migration.solution-architect
---

Review `/Tasks/architecture-migration-template.md`.

If the template does not exist, create it.
If it exists, validate whether it is sufficient for the current migration needs and update it only when necessary.

Then create a scope-specific architecture migration plan for the selected migration scope.

The plan must:
- define scope and boundaries
- identify dependencies and migration order
- identify backend/frontend handoff boundaries
- separate reusable steps from scope-specific steps
